description: Expand the SDK at lib/sdk/ into a fully-working, complete, zero-dependency TypeScript SDK package that external developers can use to build services on top of the CRM engine. Add all remaining resources, webhook event routing, module SDK, template SDK, billing SDK, auth SDK, realtime SDK, bulk operations, search SDK, and file SDK with comprehensive types and documentation.
steps: Expand lib/sdk/types.ts - Add types for ALL additional resources: Document (id, tenantId, title, type, url, entityType, entityId, uploadedBy, size, mimeType, createdAt, updatedAt), Quote (id, tenantId, quoteNumber, dealId, contactId, status, totalAmount, validUntil, items[], createdAt, updatedAt), Order (id, tenantId, orderNumber, contactId, companyId, status, totalAmount, items[], createdAt, updatedAt), Contract (id, tenantId, title, contactId, companyId, status, startDate, endDate, value, createdAt, updatedAt), Subscription (id, tenantId, contactId, planName, status, amount, interval, startDate, nextBillingDate, createdAt, updatedAt), Service (id, tenantId, name, description, price, duration, category, status, createdAt, updatedAt), Meeting (id, tenantId, title, startTime, endTime, attendees, location, status, dealId, contactId, createdAt, updatedAt), Activity (id, tenantId, type, subject, entityType, entityId, performedBy, completedAt, createdAt, updatedAt), Form (id, tenantId, title, fields[], status, submissionCount, createdAt, updatedAt), Sequence (id, tenantId, name, status, steps[], enrolledCount, createdAt, updatedAt), Automation (id, tenantId, name, trigger, actions[], status, runCount, lastRunAt, createdAt, updatedAt), Report (id, tenantId, name, type, config, lastRunAt, createdAt, updatedAt). Add Create/Update types for each. Add WebhookEventType union expanded with document.*, quote.*, order.*, contract.*, subscription.*, meeting.*, form.submitted, sequence.*, automation.*. Add BulkOperation types, SearchQuery types, FileUpload types, RealtimeEvent types.
Create lib/sdk/resources/documents.ts - DocumentsResource class with list/get/create/update/delete following contacts.ts pattern.
Create lib/sdk/resources/quotes.ts - QuotesResource class with list/get/create/update/delete plus accept(id) and reject(id) methods.
Create lib/sdk/resources/orders.ts - OrdersResource class with list/get/create/update/delete.
Create lib/sdk/resources/contracts.ts - ContractsResource class with list/get/create/update/delete plus sign(id) method.
Create lib/sdk/resources/subscriptions.ts - SubscriptionsResource class with list/get/create/update/cancel(id)/pause(id)/resume(id).
Create lib/sdk/resources/services.ts - ServicesResource class with list/get/create/update/delete.
Create lib/sdk/resources/meetings.ts - MeetingsResource class with list/get/create/update/delete/cancel(id).
Create lib/sdk/resources/activities.ts - ActivitiesResource class with list/get/create (no update/delete - activities are immutable logs).
Create lib/sdk/resources/forms.ts - FormsResource class with list/get/create/update/delete plus getSubmissions(formId, options).
Create lib/sdk/resources/sequences.ts - SequencesResource class with list/get/create/update/delete plus enroll(id, contactIds) and unenroll(id, contactIds).
Create lib/sdk/resources/automations.ts - AutomationsResource class with list/get/create/update/delete plus trigger(id, data) and pause(id)/resume(id).
Create lib/sdk/resources/reports.ts - ReportsResource class with list/get/create/delete plus run(id) which returns report data.
Update lib/sdk/resources/index.ts - Export all new resource classes.

Create lib/sdk/bulk.ts - BulkOperations class with methods: createMany<T>(resource: string, items: T[]): Promise<{created: number, errors: any[]}>, updateMany(resource: string, ids: string[], data: Partial<T>): Promise<{updated: number}>, deleteMany(resource: string, ids: string[]): Promise<{deleted: number}>. Uses RequestFn internally.

Create lib/sdk/search.ts - SearchSDK class with methods: global(query: string, options?: {entities?: string[], limit?: number}): Promise<SearchResult[]>, advanced(entity: string, filters: SearchFilter[]): Promise<PaginatedResponse<any>>. Define SearchFilter type with field, operator (eq, neq, contains, gt, lt, between, in), value.

Create lib/sdk/files.ts - FileSDK class with methods: upload(file: {name: string, content: Buffer | string, mimeType: string}, entityType?: string, entityId?: string): Promise<FileUploadResult>, download(fileId: string): Promise<{url: string, expiresAt: string}>, getPresignedUrl(fileId: string, expiresIn?: number): Promise<string>, list(options?: {entityType?: string, entityId?: string}): Promise<PaginatedResponse<Document>>.

Create lib/sdk/realtime.ts - RealtimeSDK class with methods: connect(): void, disconnect(): void, on(event: string, handler: (data: any) => void): void, off(event: string, handler?: (data: any) => void): void, subscribe(channel: string): void, unsubscribe(channel: string): void. Uses EventSource (SSE) internally with reconnection logic.

Create lib/sdk/auth.ts - AuthSDK class with methods: getToken(): string, setToken(token: string): void, refreshToken(): Promise<string>, impersonate(userId: string): Promise<{token: string}>, initSSO(provider: string, redirectUrl: string): Promise<{url: string}>. Takes the client config in constructor.

Create lib/sdk/billing.ts - BillingSDK class with methods: getCurrentPlan(): Promise<{plan: string, limits: Record<string, number>, usage: Record<string, number>}>, checkLimit(resource: string): Promise<{allowed: boolean, current: number, max: number}>, getUsage(): Promise<UsageReport>, requestUpgrade(planId: string): Promise<{url: string}>.

Create lib/sdk/templates.ts - TemplateSDK class with methods: getCurrent(): Promise<{template: IndustryTemplate, modules: string[], features: string[]}>, getAvailableModules(): Promise<ModuleInfo[]>, enableModule(moduleId: string): Promise<void>, getConfig(): Promise<Record<string, any>>.

Update lib/sdk/webhooks.ts - Add WebhookRouter class: register(event: WebhookEventType, handler: (payload: WebhookPayload) => Promise<void>): void, handle(rawBody: string, signature: string): Promise<{acknowledged: boolean, event: string}>. Keep existing WebhookVerifier.

Update lib/sdk/client.ts - Add lazy getters for all new resources (documents, quotes, orders, contracts, subscriptions, services, meetings, activities, forms, sequences, automations, reports) and SDK sub-modules (bulk, search, files, realtime, auth as authSDK, billing, templates). Import from new files.
Update lib/sdk/index.ts - Export all new classes and types from the new files.

Create lib/sdk/README.md - Comprehensive documentation: Installation & Setup section (npm install, config with apiKey + baseUrl), Authentication section (API key usage, token management), All Resources section with code examples for contacts/deals/leads/companies/tasks/tickets/invoices/documents/quotes/orders/contracts/subscriptions/services/meetings/activities/forms/sequences/automations/reports, Bulk Operations section, Search section, File Management section, Webhooks section (setup, event routing, signature verification), Realtime Events section (SSE connection), Module Development guide (defineModule, manifest structure), Template SDK section, Billing SDK section, Error Handling section (NuCRMError, retry patterns).

Create tests/unit/sdk-resources.test.ts - Test that NuCRMClient exposes all resource getters (contacts, deals, leads, companies, tasks, tickets, invoices, documents, quotes, orders, contracts, subscriptions, services, meetings, activities, forms, sequences, automations, reports). Test that BulkOperations, SearchSDK, FileSDK, RealtimeSDK, AuthSDK, BillingSDK, TemplateSDK classes can be instantiated. Test WebhookRouter registers handlers and routes events correctly. Test WebhookVerifier verify/parse methods.
acceptance_criteria: NuCRMClient exposes 20 resource getters (7 existing + 13 new) all fully typed
BulkOperations class supports createMany, updateMany, deleteMany
SearchSDK supports global search and advanced filtered search
FileSDK supports upload, download, presignedUrl, list
WebhookRouter routes events to registered handlers with signature verification
lib/sdk/README.md has comprehensive documentation with code examples
npm test passes including new sdk-resources tests
findings: All 24 SDK tests pass. TypeScript strict mode passes with 0 errors. Pre-existing integration test failures (backup-integrity requiring PostgreSQL) are unrelated. RealtimeSDK throws a clear error when EventSource is not available (Node environment without polyfill).
